original_text:
England secured a point in the second matchday of Group L after drawing against Ghana in the game held in Boston. Bellingham started for his national team and played 73 minutes.

The match was evenly contested from the start, and although England dominated possession, they failed to create clear opportunities to take the lead before halftime. After the restart, the English side maintained their initiative, but the 0-0 scoreline remained unchanged. With this result, England now has four points and will aim to secure their spot in the Round of 16 in the final group stage match against Panama (Saturday, June 27; 11:00 pm CEST).
